title: Replace deprecated datetime.utcnow() with timezone-aware call
description: Python 3.12 deprecated datetime.utcnow(). This replaces all occurrences with datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc) to avoid the deprecation warning and ensure timezone-aware datetimes.
diff:
diff --git a/utils/time_utils.py b/utils/time_utils.py
index 2a3b4c5..d6e7f8a 100644
--- a/utils/time_utils.py
+++ b/utils/time_utils.py
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
-from datetime import datetime
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
 
 
 def current_timestamp() -> datetime:
     '''Return the current UTC timestamp.'''
-    return datetime.utcnow()
+    return datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc)
 
 
 def format_iso(dt: datetime) -> str:
comments: derek: Good proactive fix for the 3.12 deprecation. Approve.
author: elena
